roles.name: Principal
roles.description: School principal with full administrative access to all modules and system settings.

roles.name: Vice Principal
roles.description: Vice principal with broad access to academics, staff, and student management.

roles.name: Academic Coordinator
roles.description: Coordinates academic programs, timetables, exam schedules, and curriculum planning.

roles.name: Teacher
roles.description: Teacher. Records attendance, enters marks, manages academic activities, and views student profiles.

roles.name: Receptionist
roles.description: Front-office receptionist. Manages admissions, visitor records, and inquiry handling.

roles.name: Accountant
roles.description: Accounts administrator. Manages fee structures, collections, invoices, salaries, and financial reports.

roles.name: Expense Manager
roles.description: Expense manager. Oversees school expenses, financial reporting, and budgeting.
